data.title: Robert Half named by Forbes as one of America's Best Employers for Company Culture 2025, among 600 recognized companies.
data.description: A business consulting firm called Robert Half (NYSE: RHI) based in Menlo Park, California, has recently been named one of America's Best Employers for Company Culture for the year 2025 by Forbes. This prestigious list features 600 organizations from various sectors across the United States that excel in providing exemplary company culture for their employees.

data.title: Jill Wagner and Trevor Donovan to star in Great American Christmas 2025 movie, "Christmas By the Spoonful."
data.description: In a recent announcement on September 18, 2025, Great American Media revealed that Jill Wagner and Trevor Donovan, known for their roles in various Christmas movies, will be starring in a new Original film titled "Christmas By the Spoonful." This holiday-themed movie is set to feature the duo in lead roles and is generating excitement among fans of this genre. Jill Wagner, recognized for her performances in "A Christmas Miracle for Daisy" and "Bringing Christmas Home," will bring her talent to this production alongside Trevor Donovan, acclaimed for his roles in "A Little Women's Christmas" and "Jingle Bell Princess." The collaboration between these two actors promises to deliver an entertaining experience for viewers looking forward to festive entertainment this holiday season.

data.title: Hendershot Cowart P.C. announces 2 attorneys, Keith Lefkowitz and Bryan Tehrani, selected for 2025 Texas Super Lawyers Rising Stars list.
data.description: In a recent press release dated September 18, 2025, Hendershot Cowart P.C. shared the exciting news that Keith Lefkowitz and Bryan Tehrani, two of the firm's attorneys, have been recognized for their exceptional legal skills. Both lawyers have been named to the prestigious 2025 Texas Super Lawyers Rising Stars list. Keith Lefkowitz specializes in areas such as health care and administrative law, while Bryan Tehrani has also earned this esteemed recognition for his outstanding legal work. This achievement highlights their dedication and expertise in the field.

data.title: Onex Partners buys Integrated Specialty Coverages from KKR. ISC employees get cash payouts.
data.description: In a joint statement, prominent investment companies KKR and Onex disclosed their collaboration to have Onex Partners procure Integrated Specialty Coverages (ISC), an advanced insurance platform. ISC specializes in creating, assessing, and delivering insurance products globally. The acquisition will involve providing significant monetary rewards to all ISC staff for their ownership interests in the firm. The deal marks a significant milestone in the ongoing partnership between KKR, Onex, ISC leadership, and employees.

data.title: Cuyahoga DD staff and volunteers unite for fourth annual Days of Service at 17 organizations in Cleveland.
data.description: In Cleveland, on September 18, 2025, the Cuyahoga County Board of Developmental Disabilities (Cuyahoga DD) staff, known for aiding individuals, will collaborate closely with the people they assist to aid other mission-oriented causes. This unique initiative will last for an extended period this year, showcasing solidarity and teamwork.

data.title: Elevate'25 summit in London focuses on AI for mobile customer experiences, aiming to drive value for marketers.
data.description: A digital innovation summit called Elevate'25 in London aims to assist marketers and product leaders in utilizing AI to create mobile-first customer experiences that add value. The summit will focus on harnessing AI for improved customer experiences and is expected to attract a large number of industry professionals.
Canada’s PM Carney Appoints Ex-Lawmaker David Lametti As UN Ambassador

data.title: BTC futures and options market activity surges with Bitcoin above $115.2k; 95% of supply in profit. Post-FOMC impact on volatility and liquidity.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is holding steady above $115,200, with 95% of the total supply currently showing a profit. Following the recent Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting, the futures and options markets are experiencing a surge in activity, reaching record levels. This heightened activity is affecting both the volatility and liquidity of the market.

data.title: Middle East & North Africa construction equipment market was valued at USD 11.04 Billion in 2024, expected to reach USD 13.81 Billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 3.81% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A report on the Middle East & North Africa Construction Equipment Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, the market was valued at USD 11.04 billion, with a projected increase to USD 13.81 billion by 2030, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.81%. The construction equipment market in the Middle East & North Africa is currently experiencing stable growth.

data.title: Binance Coin (BNB) surpasses $1,000 with 10.5% weekly growth, beating Bitcoin and Ethereum. Bitcoin at $117,559.19 and Ethereum at $4,606.60.
data.description: Binance Coin (BNB) has surged over 10% in the past week, breaking the $1,000 milestone on Thursday morning. This performance surpasses Bitcoin and Ethereum. As of the latest data, BNB is priced at $992.15 with a market capitalization of $138 billion, showing a 7-day trend increase of 10.5%. In comparison, Bitcoin is at $117,559.19 with a market cap of $2.3 trillion, marking a 2.6% rise, while Ethereum is priced at $4,606.60 with a market cap of $556 billion, reflecting a 3.9% increase. Analysts suggest a support level for BNB at $918 for the continuation of the upward trend, with speculations arising about it potentially reaching $1,200 next.

data.title: IPA honors 11 industry leaders at IPAVision 2025 conference in Boston, recognizing their impact on alternative investments industry.
data.description: In Boston on September 18, 2025, the Institute for Portfolio Alternatives (IPA) honored eleven individuals for their exceptional contributions to the alternative investments sector at the IPAVision 2025 conference. The event served as a platform to celebrate these leaders' achievements and influence in the industry.

data.title: U.S. Dermatology Partners opens new office in Decatur, Texas, expanding dermatology care access in Wise County, 40 miles north of Fort Worth.
data.description: A new clinic opening in Decatur, Texas by U.S. Dermatology Partners will offer expanded dermatology care to patients in Wise County. Located 40 miles north of Fort Worth, this office aims to improve access to care in the region. This announcement was made on Sept. 18, 2025, by the organization.

data.title: Kitchen invention MixAid by Luisa Marchese and Dawn Archie-Johansen earns $150k in sales, sells out on Amazon in 3 days.
data.description: The debut of a groundbreaking kitchen innovation, MixAid, crafted by Luisa Marchese and Dawn Archie-Johansen from Tyler, Texas, has caused a sensation on social media. The reusable stand mixer insert has gained significant popularity since its launch. The invention made headlines after its introduction and has garnered widespread attention online.

data.title: Susan G. Komen to host MORE THAN PINK Walk in Oklahoma City aiming to raise $1.13M for breast cancer research.
data.description: In 2025, Susan G. Komen® will host the Oklahoma City MORE THAN PINK Walk to bring together breast cancer survivors, individuals with metastatic breast cancer (MBC), and supporters. The event is set to raise $1.13 million for Komen's mission to fund lifesaving initiatives. This gathering aims to unite the community and generate essential funds to support Komen's impactful work in the fight against breast cancer.

data.title: Zebu Live 2025 hosts UK's biggest Web3 Summit with industry giants like Coinbase, Solana. London, Sept 18, 2025.
data.description: A highly anticipated blockchain summit in London has brought together key figures in the crypto world, prominent industry leaders, and influential political voices to spearhead innovation in fintech. Taking place on September 18, 2025, the event named Zebu Live is being hailed as one of the top Web3 conferences in the UK. The summit has announced an impressive roster of speakers and sponsors, showcasing the participation of notable personalities and companies in the sector. Keep abreast of the latest developments at this high-profile gathering where significant discussions on the future of fintech are taking place.

data.title: Cinterra appoints Michael Rothwell as CFO after interim tenure, specializing in solar and electrical services.
data.description: In Hope Mills, North Carolina on September 18, 2025, it was announced by Cinterra, a prominent company in utility-scale solar and electrical infrastructure services, that Michael Rothwell has been named as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO). This decision follows his effective tenure in the interim position.
